VALIDATION.USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Username must be at least 3 characters long.
VALIDATION.USERNAME_INVALID: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
VALIDATION.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
VALIDATION.PASSWORD_INVALID: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character.
VALIDATION.COUNTRY_CODE_INVALID: Country code must be exactly 2 characters long.
